c1: Hi! I'm Vectiba 👋 Which car are you looking to sell?
c3: Nice. Do you already have a price you've been quoted?
c5: Good to know. Let's see if the world will pay more. How many kilometers?
c6: Around 31,000 km. No accidents, one owner.
c7: Perfect. Now let's take a few photos so dealers can trust it — front, side, interior and exterior.
c9: ✓ Verified. Bodywork looks clean, interior is well-kept, and the dashboard confirms 31,000 km.
c10: You're all set. Ready to beat that $60,000 quote?
v_pricetobeat: Price to beat — your local quote
w_over: +$7,500 over the quote you already had
w_next: Vectiba handles export, customs, shipping and secure payment. You'll get the money once the car ships — track it in the app.
